title: Surveillance of chikungunya - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of chikungunya
Learn about chikungunya surveillance.
- How many cases are there of chikungunya around the world?
- For more information

## How many cases are there of chikungunya around the world?
Currently, chikungunya occurs worldwide in at-risk areas .
Other countries have reported cases in individuals who have travelled to some of the at-risk areas. The latest available data can be obtained from national and international health organizations.

## For more information
- Pan American Health Organization: Chikungunya
- European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control: Chikungunya
- World Health Organization: Chikungunya outbreaks
